description: Amp up your style quotient with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and absolutely comfortable for the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team them with chinos and a simple shirt for that cool, casual look.UpperLeather upper for that stylish look and comfort feelLong tongue and slip on style for easy wearRugged stitch detailing for style and durabilityMid-soleComplete padded leather lining for breathable comfortBrand badge on the foot-bedOutsoleTPR outsole which is stuck to the upper, with a raised heel and textured grooves on half the heel for maximum grip, traction and easy movement of the footshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
